title: Connected Little Boxes
description: Use the Connected Little Box framework to build devices that respond to the world — buttons, NeoPixels, rotary encoders, stepper motors, and ultrasonic sensors, all orchestrated by the CLB manager system.

chapters.title: Chapter 1: CLB Setup
chapters.desc: Install the CLB framework and run the Hello CLB test program

chapters.title: Chapter 2: Button Light
chapters.desc: Light up a NeoPixel strip when a button is pressed

chapters.title: Chapter 3: Encoder Brightness
chapters.desc: Use a rotary encoder to control NeoPixel brightness

chapters.title: Chapter 4: Stepper Motors
chapters.desc: Wire 28BYJ-48 steppers via ULN2003 boards and drive a two-wheel robot using the CLB stepper manager

chapters.title: Chapter 5: Distance Sensor
chapters.desc: Wire an HC-SR04 ultrasonic sensor and use the CLB hcsr04 manager to take distance readings and publish proximity events
